How to Write a Perfect Thank You Card

30 real thank you messages you can copy-paste today. 5 pro writing tips from our card editors. Bad-vs-good comparisons so you can spot the generic stuff and write something they'll actually remember.

📝 30 copy-paste messages 💡 5 writing tips ✅ Bad vs Good examples ❓ FAQs answered
Jump to: 30 Messages 5 Writing Tips Bad vs Good FAQ Pick a Thank You Template

1 30 Thank You Messages You Can Steal Today

Click 📋 Copy to save to clipboard. Click 🎴 Use on a card to open a thank you template with this message ready to go.

01 ✍️ General
Thank you. Just two words, but I mean them with my whole heart. 🙏💛
🎴 Use on a card
02 ✍️ General
I couldn't have done it without you. Thank you for everything. 💙✨
🎴 Use on a card
03 ✍️ General
Thank you for your kindness — it didn't go unnoticed. 🫶💕
🎴 Use on a card
04 ✍️ General
I'm truly grateful. Thank you for being there. 🙏
🎴 Use on a card
05 ✍️ General
Thank you for going above and beyond. You're amazing. 🌟
🎴 Use on a card
06 ✍️ General
Words can't say how thankful I am. But here's a start: Thank you. 💖
🎴 Use on a card
07 👩 For Her
Thank you, beautiful, for putting up with me. You're my favourite. 😘💕
🎴 Use on a card
08 👩 For Her
To the woman who does it all — thank you for everything, my love. 💐💖
🎴 Use on a card
09 👩 For Her
Thank you for being my rock, my joy, my everything. 💙💫
🎴 Use on a card
10 👩 For Her
I don't say it enough: thank you for all that you do. I love you. 💗✨
🎴 Use on a card
11 👩 For Her
Thank you for choosing me every single day. 💘
🎴 Use on a card
12 👩 For Her
For every little thing — thank you, gorgeous. You're the best. 🌹💝
🎴 Use on a card
13 👨 For Him
Thank you, babe, for always having my back. You're a keeper. 💙💪
🎴 Use on a card
14 👨 For Him
To my favourite guy — thank you for being the calm in my chaos. 🧘❤️
🎴 Use on a card
15 👨 For Him
Thank you for being such an incredible man. I'm so lucky. 🏆💞
🎴 Use on a card
16 👨 For Him
Thank you for putting up with my nonsense. I owe you a lot of pizza. 🍕😂💕
🎴 Use on a card
17 👨 For Him
Thank you for every hug, every laugh, every 'it's okay'. 💖
🎴 Use on a card
18 👨 For Him
You make me braver just by being there. Thank you, handsome. 🤗💙
🎴 Use on a card
19 👨👩👧 Family
Thank you, Mom, for the sacrifices you made. I'll never fully repay you. 💐💗
🎴 Use on a card
20 👨👩👧 Family
Dad — thank you for teaching me what hard work and integrity look like. 🛠️💙
🎴 Use on a card
21 👨👩👧 Family
To my parents: thank you for everything. I love you both. ❤️
🎴 Use on a card
22 👨👩👧 Family
Thank you for always believing in me, even when I didn't. 🙏💞
🎴 Use on a card
23 👨👩👧 Family
Family: first teacher, biggest fan, forever home. Thank you all. 🏡❤️
🎴 Use on a card
24 👨👩👧 Family
Thank you for loving me at my worst. You guys are my people. 💛
🎴 Use on a card
25 👯 Friends
Thank you for being my best friend. You're stuck with me forever. 😜🧡
🎴 Use on a card
26 👯 Friends
Thank you for the late-night calls, the honest advice, and never judging. 🙏💙
🎴 Use on a card
27 👯 Friends
To my bestie: thank you for all the laughs, the good, the bad, the weird. 👯💖
🎴 Use on a card
28 👯 Friends
Thank you, buddy. I couldn't ask for a better friend. 👊😇
🎴 Use on a card
29 👯 Friends
Thanks for being the friend I call at 2am when the world is on fire. ☕🔥
🎴 Use on a card
30 👯 Friends
You're more friend, less family. Thank you for everything. 💛
🎴 Use on a card

2 5 Pro Tips for Writing Thank You Cards That Get Saved

After editing 10,000+ greeting cards, these are the 5 patterns that separate "nice" cards from "I kept this on my fridge for 3 years" cards.

  1. 💡 Name the EXACT thing you're thanking them for — not 'thanks for everything'.
  2. 💡 State the impact: 'Because you did X, I was able to Y'.
  3. 💡 End with an offer to return the favour (specific — not 'anytime').
  4. 💡 Acknowledge their cost: 'I know this took your weekend and I'll never forget it.'
  5. 💡 Keep it short — true gratitude doesn't need a novel.

3 Bad vs Good: Thank You Card Messages, Side by Side

The difference between a forgotten card and a remembered one is usually 2 specific sentences. Here's what that looks like in practice.

❌ Don't write this
Thanks for everything.
✅ Write this instead
Thank you for driving 2 hours in the rain to pick me up from the airport last Tuesday. That meant everything.
❌ Don't write this
I really appreciate it.
✅ Write this instead
I know it ate into your weekend and you never complained. Thank you from the bottom of my heart — I owe you big time.
❌ Don't write this
You are so helpful!
✅ Write this instead
You're more than helpful — you're the reason I didn't quit. Thank you for literally everything. 🙏

4 Thank You Card Writing — FAQ

The questions we get asked 4–5 times a week about writing thank you cards.

Can I send a thank-you by text?

Favour = written card (physical or SendAFun digital). Text only for tiny things like grabbing coffee. The effort matters.

How soon after the favour do I send it?

Within 72 hours. After that it feels like an afterthought. Even a 2-line note sent fast is better than a 2-page essay sent 2 months later.

Money gift — how to thank without naming the amount?

"Your generous gift" or "your incredible kindness". Don't name the number. Focus on what it enabled: "it will go straight to our honeymoon fund".

Is "thanks again" a bad sign-off?

It's fine but "gratefully, [name]" or "you're the best, [name]" feels warmer. 1 level up, zero effort.

5 Pick a Thank You Template & Send in 60 Seconds

All templates are free to design, personalise, and preview. No account needed.
